design_philosophy: Tech-forward, clean, minimal — premium SaaS aesthetic for an IT services company. Terminal-inspired UI with high data density but elegant spacing.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white

visual_enhancers.glowing_orbs: Absolute positioned divs with bg-[radial-gradient(circle,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-cyan-500/20 via-transparent to-transparent blur-3xl

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#00d4ff] text-[#00d4ff] hover:bg-[#00d4ff] hover:text-[#040810] font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-4 px-8 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,212,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,212,255,0.6)]
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-white hover:text-[#00d4ff] font-mono py-4 px-8 transition-colors duration-300

components.service_cards: border border-white/10 bg-[#0a1120]/50 p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#00d4ff]/50 transition-all duration-300 group
components.tech_pills: px-3 py-1 border border-white/10 rounded-full text-xs font-mono text-gray-400 bg-white/5
components.navigation: fixed w-full top-0 z-50 border-b border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#040810]/80

animations.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for the Tech Stack pills in the About section (slow, smooth drift)

image_urls.description: Abstract pattern of dark squares on blue background, useful for abstract section backgrounds or hero overlay.
Miami skyline night dark, use as a very low opacity background (10%) for the Contact or About section.
Rows of metal bars illuminated with blue light. Represents IT network infrastructure.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Unbounded font for headings and DM Mono for body text.
Implement a dark theme ONLY (no light mode). Use #040810 as the core background.
The Hero section MUST contain a 'terminal widget' - a stylized div that looks like a command prompt window, displaying a fake ping to geamyservices.com with a green ONLINE status.
Add a grid texture overlay to the entire body background: a repeating linear gradient of 1px white/3% lines every 32px.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or Lucide for service cards, keeping them thin and tech-oriented.
Service cards should NOT be rounded (use rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to fit the terminal/brutalist tech aesthetic.
Implement the Tech Stack pills in the About section using react-fast-marquee to create an infinite slow-moving ticker.
Buttons should have sharp corners, neon borders, and glowing hover states. NO generic Vercel/Shadcn rounded buttons.
Form inputs in the Contact section must have transparent backgrounds, bottom border only (or full sharp borders), and neon focus states (focus:border-[#00d4ff] focus:ring-[#00d4ff]/20).
Do NOT use pure Inter or Roboto fonts anywhere. Stick to the Unbounded + DM Mono combination.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, forms, navigation links).
